notes: Spell IDs listed in excludedSpellIds are obtainable in-game (or appear in API) but are intentionally omitted from mounts.json. Each ID must be justified in docs/mount-catalog-exceptions.md.
2026-03: Datamined / never-shipped Retail mounts (cut before release); excluded so exports and farm lists stay honest.
28828: Not a learnable mount spell on Retail (bogus / legacy map entry); real Netherwing drakes use other summon spells.
